markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and finalize engagement details for Transmit Security's collaboration with fwd.digital on content creation and outbound marketing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreed to proceed with Work Streams 1 (content creation) and 6 (outbound marketing) for a total of $15K/month ($9K + $6K respectively)](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Rachael emphasized the importance of starting with fresh content for the new website](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Marcel highlighted the comprehensive nature of their outbound services, including lead enrichment and personalized outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Both parties aim to demonstrate quick results to potentially expand services in Q1 2024](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

## Topics

### Budget and Scope Clarification

  - [Initially discussed $6K/month for outbound, but Marcel explained the true value and scope of their services](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Agreed on $15K total: $9K for content (Work Stream 1) and $6K for outbound (Work Stream 6)](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Rachael emphasized willingness to pay full price for quality services](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Plan to potentially expand services in Q1 2024 after demonstrating initial results](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

### Content Creation (Work Stream 1)

  - [Identified as a top priority to support the new website launch](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [$9K/month budget already approved by Rachael's boss](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Marcel mentioned hiring four new managing editors, with a dedicated person for Transmit Security](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

### Outbound Marketing (Work Stream 6)

  - [Includes end-to-end campaign management, hyper-personalized messaging, and performance measurement](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Marcel emphasized the comprehensive nature of their approach, including IP warming, domain setup, and lead enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Rachael sees this as an opportunity to test and extend their outbound efforts efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

### AI and Automation in Sales

  - [Discussed the limitations of current tools like Outreach and the need for more personalized, AI-driven approaches](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Highlighted the shift towards highly tailored, one-sequence-per-prospect strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Rachael expressed interest in leveraging AI to show quick results within tight timeframes](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Vendor Onboarding Process

  - [Transmit Security requires a security review for all vendors](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Includes background checks for team members and detailed questionnaires](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Marcel requested a heads-up on potential roadblocks in the security review process](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Rachael to send security review questions to Marcel for preparation](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Website Design Discussion

  - [Briefly touched on website design options (Lightbox vs. No Boring Design)](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Rachael leaning towards No Boring Design due to professionalism and cost-effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Marcel shared candid feedback about challenges with Lightbox, advising caution](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send updated Statement of Work (SOW) for Work Streams 1 and 6](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Rachael to obtain written approval from Rakesh for the content piece (Work Stream 1)](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Initiate security review process with Transmit Security's CSO](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare for security questionnaires and potential background checks](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Target kick-off date of December 9th, with flexibility to adjust based on security review timeline](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up in January to discuss potential expansion of services with Transmit Security's sales executives](https://fathom.video/share/Hp8fdiFqD2E5A4_fW4om6i5Qrs4og3hM?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
